sections.heading: An Act to provide income tax deductions for
sections.summary: This Act amends the Taxation Laws to provide income tax deductions for shares in film licensed investment companies (FLICs) issued during the period the FLIC's concessional capital licence is in force.
sections.source_quote: An Act to provide income tax deductions for investment in film licensed investment companies, and for related purposes [Assented to 7 December 1998]
